description.value: Aura moderate universal; CL 8th; Weight â; Slot none; Price 5,000 gp DESCRIPTION Once per day, an alchemist can use this simple-looking glass vial to combine two extracts into one usable extract as if he had the combine extracts discovery. An admixture vial can combine extracts of 3rd level or lower. Extracts combined with an admixture vial cannot be combined again using this item or the combine extracts discovery. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must be an alchemist with the combine extracts discovery; Cost 2,500 gp
